name: RYDER SYSTEM INC
business: Ryder System, Inc. is a leading provider of outsourced logistics and transportation services throughout North America, offering port-to-door solutions that integrate every step of the supply chain. The company reports financial performance based on three business segments: Fleet Management Solutions (full service leasing, commercial rental, vehicle maintenance), Supply Chain Solutions (integrated logistics), and Dedicated Transportation Solutions (turnkey transportation including vehicles, drivers, and support). Its customer base spans a variety of industries including omnichannel retail, automotive, consumer packaged goods, industrial, and healthcare.
sellsTo: omnichannel retail (retail, technology, last mile, e-commerce)

exposures.sentence: Ryder is a leading provider of outsourced logistics and transportation services throughout North America.
Our e-commerce and last mile services accounted for 18% of our SCS total revenue.
Advancements in warehouse automation technology, such as autonomous mobile robots (AMRs), have impacted, and may continue to impact, our supply chain business.
Certain innovations, such as an increase in customer use of zero-emission vehicles, for example, could reduce the demand for our diesel vehicle and related maintenance and other offerings.

For example, the transportation and logistics industries may be impacted by innovations in advanced vehicle, machine learning and artificial intelligence technologies (e.g., zero-emission vehicles, autonomous or driver-assist technologies, and warehouse automation), as well as technologies we cannot yet foresee.

Additionally, emerging technologies such as artificial intelligence may make it more difficult to implement protective measures that detect and prevent the occurrence of breaches or cyber incidents described above.
We face risks related to cybersecurity incidents and other breaches of our systems and information technology.
If labor shortages exist for an extended period of time, our earnings may be adversely impacted.

tamClaims.claim: The U.S. commercial fleet market is estimated to include approximately 11 million vehicles, of which 5 million are privately owned by companies, 2 million are for-hire carriers, 1 million are leased from banks or other financial institutions, 1 million are part of utilities and government fleets, and 1 million are being leased or rented from third parties like Ryder.
tamClaims.sentence: The U.S. commercial fleet market is estimated to include approximately 11 million vehicles, of which 5 million are privately owned by companies, 2 million are for-hire carriers, 1 million are leased from banks or other financial institutions, 1 million are part of utilities and government fleets, and 1 million are being leased or rented from third parties like Ryder.

tamClaims.claim: Logistics spending in the U.S. in the key target markets in which we operate was approximately $1.5 trillion, of which $234 billion was outsourced.
tamClaims.sentence: Logistics spending in the U.S. in the key target markets in which we operate was approximately $1.5 trillion, of which $234 billion was outsourced.

tamClaims.claim: The outsourced U.S. dedicated market was estimated to be $31 billion from an addressable market of approximately $500 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: The outsourced U.S. dedicated market was estimated to be $31 billion 3 from an addressable market of approximately $500 billion.
